body.en:
You've built a webpage and customized it. Now comes the most exciting part: **putting it on the internet** where anyone with the link can see it.

This process is called **deployment**. Think of it like printing a poster and hanging it in a public place — except the "public place" is the entire internet.
body.zh:
你已经建了网页并自定义了它。现在到了最激动人心的部分：**把它放到互联网上**，任何有链接的人都能看到。

这个过程叫**部署**。就像打印海报挂在公共场所——只是「公共场所」是整个互联网。

body.en:
**Cloudflare Pages** is a free service that hosts your website. "Hosting" means they keep your files on their servers so anyone can access them through a URL.

It's like renting a tiny shop in a giant mall — except it's free, and the mall has billions of visitors.
body.zh:
**Cloudflare Pages**是一个免费的网站托管服务。「托管」意味着他们在服务器上保存你的文件，任何人都能通过URL访问。

就像在大商场租了个小店——只是它免费，而且商场有数十亿访客。

body.en: **Wrangler** is Cloudflare's command-line tool. It's what we use to upload your site. Copy and paste this command:
body.zh: **Wrangler**是Cloudflare的命令行工具。我们用它上传你的网站。复制粘贴这个命令：

body.en: You'll need a free Cloudflare account. Run **wrangler login** in your terminal — it'll open a browser window where you can sign up or log in. It only takes a minute.
body.zh: 你需要一个免费的Cloudflare账号。在终端运行 **wrangler login**——它会打开浏览器窗口让你注册或登录。只需要一分钟。

body.en: This is it — the moment of truth. One command will take your files and put them on the internet. Make sure you're in your project folder, then run the deploy command.
body.zh: 就是这一刻——真正的时刻。一条命令就能把你的文件放到互联网上。确保你在项目文件夹里，然后运行部署命令。

body.en: Type the deploy command to publish your website to the internet.
body.zh: 输入部署命令将你的网站发布到互联网。

expectedCommands.output:
✓ Uploading files...
✓ Deployment complete!

🎉 Your site is live at:
https://my-site-abc.pages.dev

Share this link with anyone!
expectedCommands.successMsg: YOUR WEBSITE IS LIVE ON THE INTERNET! 🎉

hints.en: Type: npx wrangler pages deploy dist/
hints.zh: 输入：npx wrangler pages deploy dist/

body.en:
Take a moment to appreciate this: **you have a live website on the internet**. You can share that URL with friends, family, or even put it on your resume.

You went from "I've never coded before" to "here's my website" in just a few lessons. That's not just learning — that's shipping.
body.zh:
感受一下：**你有一个在互联网上的真实网站了**。你可以把URL分享给朋友、家人，甚至放在简历上。

你从「我从没编过程」到「这是我的网站」只用了几课。这不只是学习——这是真正的上线。

title.zh: 接下来：构建真正的东西

body.en:
Congratulations on completing Week 1! 🎉 You now have all the fundamental skills:

- Use the terminal
- Talk to Claude Code
- Understand what code means
- Edit with words
- Deploy to the internet

In Week 2, you'll use these skills to **build a real project from scratch** — something you can put on your portfolio. The best part? You already know everything you need.
body.zh:
恭喜完成第一周！🎉 你现在掌握了所有基础技能：

- 使用终端
- 与Claude Code对话
- 理解代码含义
- 用文字编辑
- 部署到互联网

第二周你将用这些技能**从零构建一个真实项目**——可以放在作品集里的东西。最棒的是？你已经知道了所需的一切。
